---
title: "About"
image: TODO
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:your@neighborhoodscientist.org
    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}}"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/your.neighborhoodscientist.org
      rel: me
    - icon: mastodon
      href: https://mastodon.social/@your.neighborhoodscientist.org@bsky.brid.gy
      rel: me
    - icon: facebook
      href: https://TODO
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/neighborhood-scientist
---

:::{#about}
TODO About this blog
:::
